subcodes.first_line: This is a Book for whoso hath turned unto God, the Mighty, the Bestower. Behold naught save My resplendent and exalted Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب لمن اقبل الی الله العزیز الوهاب الاتنظر الا جمالی المشرق المنیع
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @self-description of God; God's self-remembrance
